shots.reasoning_brief: Pure visual introduction of mother and child descending from bus; no dialogue or music in excerpt; characters mapped from description.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，我的心脏蝴蝶今天要拍照了对不对？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child speaking to mother while pulling her hand; listener is mother; no actions on targets; visual focuses on child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 对，医生叔叔要看看小蝴蝶长得好不好。拍完照妈咪带你去吃鸡腿。

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother responding to child, action of adjusting straps targets child; listener is child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪，你说爸爸会不会也喜欢吃鸡腿？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child questioning mother about father; direct address to mom.
Mother directing child, action of holding hand targets child.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 心内科在三楼……可是挂号单上写的是什么VIP……

shots.reasoning_brief: Self-muttered line while checking phone; no listener; context includes child but focus on solo action.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 妈咪！那边的门好大好亮！走那边！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child calling to mother while running; listener off-frame.
Mother calling after child; listener running ahead.
Visual establishment of VIP area and man (Lu Jingchen); music from nearby context; no narration as descriptive visuals.
Child questioning man as father; listener is Lu.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 对不起！对不起！小孩子不懂事——

shots.reasoning_brief: Mother apologizing to man while pulling child; child is action target, not listener per rule.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 叔叔你不要忘了我！我长得和你一模一样！

shots.reasoning_brief: Child shouting to man while being dragged; listener is Lu.

music_cues: 大提琴缓缓拉响，低沉而微颤
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual of child leaning on mother; music from nearby; no dialogue.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_ZHIYU_CHILD
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 那他能不能帮我们付手术费？

shots.reasoning_brief: Child asking mother about help; direct listener.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: ZHAO_YIMING_ASSISTANT
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 沈念歌。行政部新来的文员。有一个四岁半的儿子。陆总……DNA报告要不要安排？

shots.reasoning_brief: Assistant's line over phone; visible likely Lu; listener is Lu.

music_cues: 钢琴低音区，一个和弦反复，压迫感渐起
shots.reasoning_brief: Lu responding over phone; fade out visual; music from nearby.
